title: neraudia angulata var. angulata
intro: Neraudia angulata var. angulata, also known as the Manoa tree or Manoa, is a type of flowering plant native to Hawaii. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Neraudia angulata var. angulata include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially aiding in the management of conditions such as arthritis and skin conditions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or oil.
